error_signature: MCP error 1004: Network error connecting to n8n API
title: Network error connecting to n8n API due to URL format
symptom: When attempting to connect Claude to n8n, the user receives MCP error 1004 indicating a network error. This occurs despite having a valid API key.
applies_when: Configured with a valid API key
not_this_if: Error occurs with a different integration or local instance
root_cause: The error arises because the n8n API URL is incorrectly formatted. The absence of the '/v1/' path in the API URL leads to 404 errors, preventing successful connections.
fix_steps: Save the changes and retry the connection
agent_instruction: Update the n8n API URL in Claude's configuration to include '/v1/'.
